easy.title: Fix the Broken File Paths
easy.description: An HTML page has multiple broken file paths. Identify and fix all the path errors to make images, CSS, and links work correctly.
easy.starterCode: About
easy.solution: About

medium.title: Organize a Project and Create a Path Reference Table
medium.description: Given a disorganized set of files, reorganize them into a proper project structure (css/, js/, images/, pages/). Then create an HTML reference table showing the correct relative paths from each page to every resource.
medium.starterCode: File Path Reference
medium.solution:
File Path Reference Table

Project structure: root/ (css/, js/, images/, pages/)

FromToRelative PathRoot-Relative
index.htmlcss/style.csscss/style.css/css/style.css
index.htmlimages/logo.pngimages/logo.png/images/logo.png
index.htmlpages/about.htmlpages/about.html/pages/about.html
pages/about.htmlcss/style.css../css/style.css/css/style.css
pages/about.htmlimages/logo.png../images/logo.png/images/logo.png
pages/about.htmlindex.html../index.html/index.html
pages/blog/post.htmlcss/style.css../../css/style.css/css/style.css
pages/blog/post.htmlimages/logo.png../../images/logo.png/images/logo.png
pages/blog/post.htmlindex.html../../index.html/index.html

hard.title: Build a Path-Aware Navigation System
hard.description: Create a navigation component that works correctly from any page depth using JavaScript to dynamically resolve root-relative paths. The navigation should be identical HTML on every page but function correctly regardless of the page's directory level.
hard.starterCode: Home About Services Contact
hard.solution:
Home About Services Contact

Home Page

This page uses root-relative paths (starting with /) in the navigation.

These links work correctly from ANY page depth because they always resolve from the site root.

Current page: index.html (root level)

Try copying this nav to pages/about.html — the links still work!

Path-Aware Active Link Detection

The JavaScript below automatically highlights the current page in the navigation.
